text.title: CD Pipelines and Deployment Strategies Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the cd-pipelines methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: choose-strategy
step.action: Pick rolling (default), blue-green (zero-downtime + warm rollback), or canary (high blast risk).

step.name: scaffold-pipeline-yaml
step.action: Generate cd.yml with discrete jobs + environment guards.

step.name: wire-health-checks
step.action: Add a wait-on-health step between each traffic shift.

step.name: implement-auto-rollback
step.action: Add a guardrail watcher: if error rate or latency breaches threshold, run --rollback.

step.name: emit-dora
step.action: On production deploy success, emit deployment_frequency event with sha + duration.
step.decision-gate: Reject ship if dora-emit step is missing.
